description:
This quiz tests intermediate to advanced Regular Expression skills, including pattern matching, quantifiers, groups, and look-around assertions. It uses an encouraging, motivational tone to challenge learners with progressively complex problems, emphasizing mastery through practice.
Topics: Basic patterns, Quantifiers, Groups, Look-around assertions, String matching, Pattern validation
Audience: Developers with existing regex knowledge seeking to refine their ability to construct and analyze complex regular expressions.
